content.name: bash

arguments.command:
set -euo pipefail
owner=$(git remote get-url origin | sed -E 's#https://github.com/([^/]+)/.*#\1#')
mkdir -p analysis

# Gather all public repos starting with githubification-
repos_file=$(mktemp)
page=1
while :; do
  json=$(curl -fsSL "https://api.github.com/users/${owner}/repos?per_page=100&page=${page}")
  count=$(printf '%s' "$json" | jq 'length')
  [ "$count" -eq 0 ] && break
  printf '%s' "$json" | jq -r '.[] | select(.private==false and (.name|startswith("githubification-"))) | [.name,.default_branch] | @tsv' >> "$repos_file"
  page=$((page+1))
done

# Download .GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis.md when present
found=0
missing=0
while IFS=$'\t' read -r repo branch; do
  [ -z "${repo:-}" ] && continue
  raw_url="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/${owner}/${repo}/${branch}/.GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis.md"
  out="analysis/${repo}.GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis.md"
  if curl -fsSL "$raw_url" -o "$out"; then
    found=$((found+1))
    echo "saved: $out"
  else
    missing=$((missing+1))
    rm -f "$out"
    echo "missing: ${repo}" >&2
  fi
done < "$repos_file"

rm -f "$repos_file"

echo "FOUND=$found MISSING=$missing"
ls -1 analysis | wc -l | awk '{print "FILES_IN_ANALYSIS=" $1}'

content.name: bash

arguments.command:
set -euo pipefail
owner=$(git remote get-url origin | sed -E 's#https://github.com/([^/]+)/.*#\1#')
mkdir -p analysis
> /tmp/githubification_repos.tsv
page=1
while :; do
  json=$(curl -fsSL "https://api.github.com/users/${owner}/repos?per_page=100&page=${page}")
  count=$(printf '%s' "$json" | jq 'length')
  [ "$count" -eq 0 ] && break
  printf '%s' "$json" | jq -r '.[] | select(.private==false and (.name|startswith("githubification-"))) | [.name,.default_branch] | @tsv' >> /tmp/githubification_repos.tsv
  page=$((page+1))
done

found=0
while IFS=$'\t' read -r repo branch; do
  [ -z "${repo:-}" ] && continue
  api="https://api.github.com/repos/${owner}/${repo}/git/trees/${branch}?recursive=1"
  paths=$(curl -fsSL "$api" | jq -r '.tree[]? | select(.type=="blob" and (.path|endswith(".GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis.md"))) | .path') || true
  if [ -n "${paths:-}" ]; then
    while IFS= read -r p; do
      [ -z "$p" ] && continue
      safe_path=$(echo "$p" | tr '/' '__')
      out="analysis/${repo}__${safe_path}"
      raw="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/${owner}/${repo}/${branch}/${p}"
      curl -fsSL "$raw" -o "$out"
      echo "saved: $out"
      found=$((found+1))
    done <<< "$paths"
  fi
done < /tmp/githubification_repos.tsv

echo "FOUND=$found"
ls -la analysis

arguments.command:
set -euo pipefail
owner=$(git remote get-url origin | sed -E 's#https://github.com/([^/]+)/.*#\1#')
while IFS=$'\t' read -r repo branch; do
  api="https://api.github.com/repos/${owner}/${repo}/git/trees/${branch}?recursive=1"
  matches=$(curl -fsSL "$api" | jq -r '.tree[]? | .path' | grep -Ei 'githubification|analysis' | head -n 5 || true)

    echo "## $repo"
    echo "$matches"
  fi
done < /tmp/githubification_repos.tsv

- `.GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis.md`

Result: **no matches found**, so `analysis/` is currently empty.

If you meant `.ANALYSIS-Githubification.md` (which appears to exist in several repos), I can collect those next.
Yes and rename to the name of the repo!

content.name: bash

arguments.command:
set -euo pipefail
owner=$(git remote get-url origin | sed -E 's#https://github.com/([^/]+)/.*#\1#')
mkdir -p analysis

# Build list of public githubification-* repos + default branch
repos_tsv=$(mktemp)
page=1
while :; do
  json=$(curl -fsSL "https://api.github.com/users/${owner}/repos?per_page=100&page=${page}")
  count=$(printf '%s' "$json" | jq 'length')
  [ "$count" -eq 0 ] && break
  printf '%s' "$json" | jq -r '.[] | select(.private==false and (.name|startswith("githubification-"))) | [.name,.default_branch] | @tsv' >> "$repos_tsv"
  page=$((page+1))
done

found=0
missing=0
# Collect .ANALYSIS-Githubification.md and rename to repo name
while IFS=$'\t' read -r repo branch; do
  [ -z "${repo:-}" ] && continue
  raw_url="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/${owner}/${repo}/${branch}/.ANALYSIS-Githubification.md"
  out_file="analysis/${repo}.md"
  if curl -fsSL "$raw_url" -o "$out_file"; then
    echo "saved: $out_file"
    found=$((found+1))
  else
    rm -f "$out_file"
    echo "missing: $repo" >&2
    missing=$((missing+1))
  fi
done < "$repos_tsv"

rm -f "$repos_tsv"
echo "FOUND=$found MISSING=$missing"
ls -1 analysis | sed 's/^/- /'

Collect all .GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis.md created in the past day from all public repo githubification-* into a new folder analysis and rename to the name of the repo

content.name: bash

arguments.command:
set -euo pipefail
owner=$(git remote get-url origin | sed -E 's#https://github.com/([^/]+)/.*#\1#')
since=$(date -u -d '24 hours ago' +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)

echo "Owner: $owner"
echo "Since: $since"

# fresh output folder
rm -rf analysis
mkdir -p analysis

# collect public githubification-* repos
repos_tsv=$(mktemp)
page=1
while :; do
  json=$(curl -fsSL "https://api.github.com/users/${owner}/repos?per_page=100&page=${page}")
  count=$(printf '%s' "$json" | jq 'length')
  [ "$count" -eq 0 ] && break
  printf '%s' "$json" | jq -r '.[] | select(.private==false and (.name|startswith("githubification-"))) | [.name,.default_branch] | @tsv' >> "$repos_tsv"
  page=$((page+1))
done

processed=0
created_found=0

while IFS=$'\t' read -r repo branch; do
  [ -z "${repo:-}" ] && continue
  processed=$((processed+1))

  commits_url="https://api.github.com/repos/${owner}/${repo}/commits?path=.GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis.md&since=${since}&per_page=100"
  commits_json=$(curl -fsSL "$commits_url" || true)

  # Skip if API returned error object or empty array
  if ! printf '%s' "$commits_json" | jq -e 'type=="array"' >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    continue
  fi
  count=$(printf '%s' "$commits_json" | jq 'length')
  [ "$count" -eq 0 ] && continue

  created_in_window=0
  # check commit details for added status on the target file
  while IFS= read -r sha; do
    [ -z "$sha" ] && continue
    detail=$(curl -fsSL "https://api.github.com/repos/${owner}/${repo}/commits/${sha}" || true)
    added=$(printf '%s' "$detail" | jq -e '.files[]? | select(.filename==".GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis.md" and .status=="added")' >/dev/null 2>&1; echo $?)
    if [ "$added" -eq 0 ]; then
      created_in_window=1
      break
    fi
  done < <(printf '%s' "$commits_json" | jq -r '.[].sha')

  if [ "$created_in_window" -eq 1 ]; then
    raw="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/${owner}/${repo}/${branch}/.GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis.md"
    out="analysis/${repo}.md"
    if curl -fsSL "$raw" -o "$out"; then
      echo "saved: $out"
      created_found=$((created_found+1))
    else
      rm -f "$out"
      echo "warn: created recently but could not download from ${repo}@${branch}" >&2
    fi
  fi
done < "$repos_tsv"

rm -f "$repos_tsv"

echo "PROCESSED=$processed CREATED_FOUND=$created_found"
ls -la analysis
ls -1 analysis 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^/- /' || true

content.partialJson:
{"command":"set -euo pipefail
owner=$(git remote get-url origin | sed -E 's#https://github.com/([^/]+)/.*#\1#')
since=$(date -u -d '24 hours ago' +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)

echo "Owner: $owner"
echo "Since: $since"

# fresh output folder
rm -rf analysis
mkdir -p analysis

# collect public githubification-* repos
repos_tsv=$(mktemp)
page=1
while :; do
  json=$(curl -fsSL "https://api.github.com/users/${owner}/repos?per_page=100&page=${page}")
  count=$(printf '%s' "$json" | jq 'length')
  [ "$count" -eq 0 ] && break
  printf '%s' "$json" | jq -r '.[] | select(.private==false and (.name|startswith("githubification-"))) | [.name,.default_branch] | @tsv' >> "$repos_tsv"
  page=$((page+1))
done

processed=0
created_found=0

while IFS=$'\t' read -r repo branch; do
  [ -z "${repo:-}" ] && continue
  processed=$((processed+1))

  commits_url="https://api.github.com/repos/${owner}/${repo}/commits?path=.GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis.md&since=${since}&per_page=100"
  commits_json=$(curl -fsSL "$commits_url" || true)

  # Skip if API returned error object or empty array
  if ! printf '%s' "$commits_json" | jq -e 'type=="array"' >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    continue
  fi
  count=$(printf '%s' "$commits_json" | jq 'length')
  [ "$count" -eq 0 ] && continue

  created_in_window=0
  # check commit details for added status on the target file
  while IFS= read -r sha; do
    [ -z "$sha" ] && continue
    detail=$(curl -fsSL "https://api.github.com/repos/${owner}/${repo}/commits/${sha}" || true)
    added=$(printf '%s' "$detail" | jq -e '.files[]? | select(.filename==".GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis.md" and .status=="added")' >/dev/null 2>&1; echo $?)
    if [ "$added" -eq 0 ]; then
      created_in_window=1
      break
    fi
  done < <(printf '%s' "$commits_json" | jq -r '.[].sha')

  if [ "$created_in_window" -eq 1 ]; then
    raw="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/${owner}/${repo}/${branch}/.GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis.md"
    out="analysis/${repo}.md"
    if curl -fsSL "$raw" -o "$out"; then
      echo "saved: $out"
      created_found=$((created_found+1))
    else
      rm -f "$out"
      echo "warn: created recently but could not download from ${repo}@${branch}" >&2
    fi
  fi
done < "$repos_tsv"

rm -f "$repos_tsv"

echo "PROCESSED=$processed CREATED_FOUND=$created_found"
ls -la analysis
ls -1 analysis 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^/- /' || true"}

content.text:
Owner: japer-technology
Since: 2026-03-26T20:45:51Z
PROCESSED=31 CREATED_FOUND=0
total 8
drwxr-xr-x 2 runner runner 4096 Mar 27 20:45 .
drwxr-xr-x 7 runner runner 4096 Mar 27 20:45 ..

Done.

I created a fresh folder:

- `analysis/`

Then scanned all public `githubification-*` repos and checked commits in the last 24 hours for **creation** (`status: added`) of:

- `.GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis.md`

Result: **no matching files were created in the past day**, so `analysis/` is currently empty.
Collect all .GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis.md created in all public repo githubification-* into a new folder analysis and rename to the name of the repo
limit=60 remaining=60 reset=1774648052

content.name: bash

arguments.command:
set -euo pipefail
owner=$(git remote get-url origin | sed -E 's#https://github.com/([^/]+)/.*#\1#')

rm -rf analysis
mkdir -p analysis

repos_tsv=$(mktemp)
page=1
while :; do
  json=$(curl -fsSL "https://api.github.com/users/${owner}/repos?per_page=100&page=${page}")
  count=$(printf '%s' "$json" | jq 'length')
  [ "$count" -eq 0 ] && break
  printf '%s' "$json" | jq -r '.[] | select(.private==false and (.name|startswith("githubification-"))) | [.name,.default_branch] | @tsv' >> "$repos_tsv"
  page=$((page+1))
done

processed=0
saved=0
not_found=0
multi=0

while IFS=$'\t' read -r repo branch; do
  [ -z "${repo:-}" ] && continue
  processed=$((processed+1))

  api="https://api.github.com/repos/${owner}/${repo}/git/trees/${branch}?recursive=1"
  tree=$(curl -fsSL "$api" || true)

  if ! printf '%s' "$tree" | jq -e 'has("tree")' >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "skip(api): $repo" >&2
    not_found=$((not_found+1))
    continue
  fi

  matches=$(printf '%s' "$tree" | jq -r '.tree[]? | select(.type=="blob") | .path' | grep -E '(^|/)\.GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis\.md$' || true)

  if [ -z "$matches" ]; then
    not_found=$((not_found+1))
    continue
  fi

  # prefer root file if present, otherwise first match alphabetically
  selected=$(printf '%s\n' "$matches" | awk 'BEGIN{root=""} {if($0==".GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis.md") root=$0; lines[NR]=$0} END{if(root!=""){print root}else{asort(lines); print lines[1]}}')

  # detect multiple matches
  if [ "$(printf '%s\n' "$matches" | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" -gt 1 ]; then
    multi=$((multi+1))
    echo "multiple: $repo -> using $selected" >&2
  fi

  raw="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/${owner}/${repo}/${branch}/${selected}"
  out="analysis/${repo}.md"
  if curl -fsSL "$raw" -o "$out"; then
    echo "saved: $out"
    saved=$((saved+1))
  else
    rm -f "$out"
    echo "failed download: $repo ($selected)" >&2
  fi

done < "$repos_tsv"

rm -f "$repos_tsv"

echo "PROCESSED=$processed SAVED=$saved NOT_FOUND_OR_SKIPPED=$not_found MULTI_MATCH_REPOS=$multi"
ls -1 analysis | sed 's/^/- /'
